title: Add configurable baud rate (300/1200)
description: Make baud rate configurable via --baud-rate CLI flag and MODEM_BAUD_RATE env var. Default stays 300. Wire through ProxyConfig, Modem, transport timeouts, and CLI.
close_reason: Implemented configurable baud rate across all layers

title: Add real acoustic speaker-to-mic e2e test
description: The e2e test uses virtual audio cables. Add a test mode that works over real speakers and microphones (acoustic profile) to validate the full air-gap scenario that modumb is designed for.

title: Explore higher baud rates for faster transfers
description: Current 300 baud rate means ~89 seconds for a simple example.com fetch. Explore 600 or 1200 baud over virtual audio cables where clock drift is zero. May need adaptive baud rate negotiation during session handshake.

title: Fix SYN decode failures during session startup
description: During e2e tests, the first 1-2 SYN frames fail to decode (189 bytes of garbage) because the relay's accept() hasn't fully started listening before the proxy sends SYN. ARQ retries recover, but this wastes ~10-15 seconds. The relay subprocess needs time to initialize audio streams before the proxy starts transmitting. May need a ready signal or longer startup delay.

title: Add sliding window ARQ to replace stop-and-wait
description: Current stop-and-wait ARQ sends one frame then waits for ACK before sending the next. For virtual cables with near-zero latency, a sliding window (e.g., Go-Back-N or Selective Repeat) could significantly improve throughput by keeping the channel busy.

title: Test e2e proxy with larger HTTP responses
description: The e2e test only fetches example.com (528 bytes). Test with larger pages to stress the protocol, expose reliability issues with many sequential frames, and verify ARQ handles sustained transfers.
close_reason: Tested with info.cern.ch (646 bytes, 14 DATA frames). Zero decode failures during transfer. 6.0 bytes/sec effective throughput at 300 baud.

title: Rename test_e2e_vbcable.py to test_e2e_vac.py
description: The e2e test script is still named test_e2e_vbcable.py but now uses two Virtual Audio Cable (Muzychenko) cables instead of VB-Cable. Rename for accuracy.
close_reason: Renamed to test_e2e_vac.py, updated references in diag_modem_exchange.py

title: Investigate occasional frame decode failure during e2e test
description: During the e2e proxy test, the relay hit 'Failed to decode 189 bytes' on the first DATA frame. ARQ retry recovered, but this suggests the relay occasionally picks up extra noise before the real frame. The receive pipeline may need further hardening to discard pre-frame garbage more reliably.
close_reason: Fixed: added silence drain after OutputStream.write() and 0.5s post-handshake delay. Root cause was Pa_WriteStream returning before audio fully played.

title: Add HTTPS/CONNECT tunnel support
description: LocalProxy currently returns 501 for CONNECT method (used by HTTPS). Implement CONNECT tunneling to support HTTPS sites through the modem proxy. This is critical for real-world usability since most sites use HTTPS.
close_reason: HTTPS CONNECT tunneling implemented with length-prefixed chunk protocol

title: Add opt-in full-duplex mode for cable/loopback
description: Implemented --duplex full|half CLI flag. When full, skips echo suppression, TX/RX locks, and turnaround delays in audio_io, modem, framer, and reliable transport. Threaded through session manager, HTTP server, local proxy, and remote relay. CLAUDE.md and e2e test script updated.
close_reason: Implemented: --duplex full|half flag across all layers, unit tests pass
